title: Test Jester: 065-E02 SEND_NAMED_CARD_TO_CEMETERY

plan.providerWarning: No WARD_LLM_API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY found. The app will use local fallback plans until a server key is configured.

card.rawText: If this card is killed in battle, inflict 10 damage to the attacking creature. If the card "Bomb" is on the field when this card is killed in battle, send "Bomb" to the cemetery.

plan.title: Test Jester: 065-E02 SEND_NAMED_CARD_TO_CEMETERY
plan.summary: Create a deterministic dev scenario for Jester and verify that 065-E02 SEND_NAMED_CARD_TO_CEMETERY resolves according to the parsed effect and WARD rules. Assertions were tightened from the printed card text for headless QA.

forcedRolls.label: Jester QA: force lethal battle damage

notes: Rules text: if Jester is killed in battle while Bomb is on the field, send Bomb to the cemetery.
Pre-place Bomb on field as the named card that should be sent to the cemetery.

steps: Set Jester as Player 1 primary and Bomb as a field magic/support card.
Player 2 attacks and kills Jester in battle.
Resolve Jester death effects and inspect Bomb zone movement.

expectedAssertions.label: Named Bomb card moved to cemetery when Jester died

manualVerification: Confirm Bomb is only sent when it is on the field at the moment Jester is killed in battle.
riskNotes: Fallback plan cannot infer every WARD edge case.
The engine remains source of truth; the LLM/fallback only proposes a QA plan.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run the generated scenario and update after reviewing result.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
